commit.message:
LU-19921 lmv: move register observer before obd_connect

Move register observer before obd_connect, so the upcall
chain can notify the observer even before obd_connect.

Signed-off-by: Di Wang <ddiwang@google.com>
Change-Id: I893a4bb64100de385040907aa7b4fc1e1e5581fc
